description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a broad, open terrace area. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with large glass windows along the longer facade, providing ample natural light. A dark rectangular section adjacent to the main building suggests a pool or water feature, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a covered entryway and a secondary structure, possibly a garage or guest house, set apart from the main living area. The overall layout emphasizes open space, geometric forms, and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large glass windows, a spacious terrace, and a possible pool, featuring minimalist geometric forms and a separate secondary structure.
description_view_0: The house is seen from the side, highlighting the long main building, terrace, and adjacent pool or water feature.
description_view_1: This view shows the front entryway, the main building's facade with large windows, and the secondary structure set back.
description_view_2: The rear of the house is visible, displaying the full length of the main structure and the open terrace area.
description_view_3: The opposite end of the house is shown, focusing on the secondary structure and the pool or water feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and minimalistic detailing
